import json, re, unicodedata, os, itertools

quran_path = '/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json'

def load_json(p):
    with open(p, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)
    
quran = load_json(quran_path)
len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:5]

# normalization helpers
import re
import unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove diacritics
    text = arabic_diacritics.sub('', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace(tatweel, '')
    # normalize hamza/aleph variants
    text = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625]', '\u0627', text)
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي')
    text = text.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي')
    # remove punctuation
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)
    # normalize spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

target_full = "وَاللَّهُ يُدْخِلُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ فِي عَهْدِهِ وَاللَّهُ وَاسِعٌ عَلِيمٌ"
snippet = "وَاللَّهُ ...عٌ عَلِيمٌ"

norm_target = normalize_ar(target_full)
norm_target

# Search Quran for verses containing pieces: try "يدخل من يشاء في" and endings "واسع عليم"
norm_quran = [(i, normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])) for i, v in enumerate(quran)]
cands = []
for i, norm in norm_quran:
    if "يدخل من يشاء" in norm:
        cands.append((i, quran[i]['ayah_text'], norm))
len(cands)

# search for "عهده" occurrences in Quran
matches_ahd = [(i, v['ayah_text']) for i, v in enumerate(quran) if 'عَهْدِهِ' in v['ayah_text'] or 'عهده' in v['ayah_text']]
len(matches_ahd), matches_ahd[:10]
